creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
update to 8.o8 (improved jpeg compression):

diff -ruN paq.orig/Makefile paq/Makefile
--- paq.orig/Makefile	Thu Oct 25 04:51:21 2007
+++ paq/Makefile	Wed Oct 24 18:01:28 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	paq
-DISTVERSION=	8o7
+DISTVERSION=	8o8
 CATEGORIES=	archivers
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.cs.fit.edu/~mmahoney/compression/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}${DISTVERSION}
diff -ruN paq.orig/distinfo paq/distinfo
--- paq.orig/distinfo	Thu Oct 25 04:52:40 2007
+++ paq/distinfo	Wed Oct 24 18:01:28 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (paq8o7.zip) = 86f63aad5991f6ce8c29707b6367baf1
-SHA256 (paq8o7.zip) = e02ed9397bb333b749fcfea35ff470994b099ec85bbed306fc7984a73d7320e0
-SIZE (paq8o7.zip) = 118405
+MD5 (paq8o8.zip) = 9114ae6a08ca8e82f37df9a6984c968d
+SHA256 (paq8o8.zip) = da36467726d234afd63aa959444cbc148a0b15315fe4a1abd26e15481ad5361d
+SIZE (paq8o8.zip) = 119817
